transformations.javascript:
return {
    Name: data?.config_param.config_param_name,
    "Service Name": data?.config_param.service_name,
    "Param Type": data.config_param.param_type,
    "Value Type": data.config_param.value_type,
    "Created By": data.config_param.created_by.email_id,
    Dimensions: data.config_param.dimensions,
    Schema: data.config_param.json_schema,
    "Marketplace Aware": data.config_param.is_marketplace_aware,
    Environment: data.config_param.env,
    ...(data.config_param.metadata?.description ? { Description: data.config_param.metadata.description } : {}),
    ...(data.config_param.metadata?.config_type ? { "Config Type": data.config_param.metadata.config_type } : {}),
    ...(data.config_param.metadata?.primary_service ? { "Primary Service": data.config_param.metadata.primary_service } : {}),
    ...(data.config_param.metadata?.dependent_services ? { "Dependent Services": data.config_param.metadata.dependent_services } : {})
};
transformations.python:
# write your code here

[row for row in data if row['amount'] > 1000]
